visual_description:
The audio opens with a tense, rhythmic, and percussive electronic score, creating a suspenseful and action-oriented atmosphere. A medium close-up shot shows a man with graying hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket over a white collared shirt. He is in a dimly lit room, possibly a kitchen, with dark wooden shelves and a few white bowls visible in the background. He looks down with a serious expression, his hand near his face. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed in white. The camera is steady, focusing on the man's contemplative demeanor.

The scene cuts to a point-of-view shot from a moving vehicle on a city street at night. The headlights of the car in front illuminate the road ahead, where other cars are also driving. The street is lined with buildings and lit by streetlights. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The camera is shaky, simulating the movement of the car. The sound of a car engine hums in the background, growing louder as it accelerates. The camera angle shifts to a close-up, shaky shot of a black car driving at night. The bright headlights of an oncoming vehicle create a significant glare, partially
